reason: Google deprecated HowTo rich results in August 2023; HowTo structured data no longer produces rich results in Google Search, so guidance recommending HowTo schema for search visibility is stale.

Google restricted FAQ rich results to well-known authoritative government and health sites in August 2023 (and has since stopped showing the feature); guidance promising FAQ rich-result eligibility from FAQPage markup is stale. FAQPage markup for AI answer engines is unaffected.
